seo.title: MemohAI - The Agent OS | Self-hosted & Containerized Isolation
seo.description: Memoh is an Agent OS built for the modern enterprise. Self-hosted, highly concurrent, and zero telemetry. Featuring containerized isolation and long-term memory architecture for secure AI agent orchestration.

hero.title: The Agent OS.
hero.subtitle: Self-hosted, highly concurrent, zero telemetry. Built for the modern enterprise.

install.title: Deploy in one command.
install.subtitle: A single script to orchestrate containers, memory, and models. Zero complex dependencies to get your Agent OS running.

usecases.title: Built for Production Scenarios
usecases.subtitle: From personal assistants to enterprise orchestrators, Memoh provides the isolated environment and memory architecture to run complex agentic workflows.

f1.title: Multi-Bot & Multi-User
f1.desc: More than just a chatbot. Create an army of agents that distinguish users in group chats and coordinate with each other.

f2.title: Containerized Isolation
f2.desc: Every agent runs in its own private 'virtual computer.' Isolated filesystems and networks ensure absolute security and stability.

f3.title: Memory Engineering
f3.desc: Long-term recall that works. Agents extract facts from conversations automatically, using hybrid search to remember every detail.

f4.title: Broad Channel Coverage
f4.desc: From Lark and Telegram to Matrix and Discord. Write your logic once, and deploy your agents across any communication platform.

f5.title: MCP Support
f5.desc: The open ecosystem. Connect external tool servers via Model Context Protocol, allowing bots to control local systems and APIs.

f6.title: Browser Automation
f6.desc: Fully autonomous browsing. Powered by Playwright, agents can navigate, fill forms, and analyze web pages like a human operator.

f7.title: Skills & Subagents
f7.desc: Modular behavior at its best. Install templates from the Supermarket and delegate heavy lifting to independent sub-agents.

f8.title: Discussion Sessions
f8.desc: Advanced multi-threading. Use slash commands to orchestrate bot flows and inspect real-time session status and context.

f9.title: Workflow Automation
f9.desc: Native cron-based tasks. Schedule agents for daily reports, periodic data scraping, or autonomous system maintenance.

f10.title: Pro Web Dashboard
f10.desc: A pro-grade management UI. Featuring streaming chat, tool call visualization, and a complete file manager.

f11.title: Access Control (ACL)
f11.desc: Security by design. Priority-based rules allow or deny actions based on user identity, channel type, or conversation IDs.

f12.title: Multi-Model Routing
f12.desc: Flexible LLM provisioning. Connect OpenAI, Anthropic, or local models and assign specific brains to specific agents.

f13.title: Instant Deployment
f13.desc: Pure Docker orchestration. Automatic migrations and networking mean you can spin up the entire cluster in under three minutes.

gallery.title: Platform Features
gallery.subtitle: A glimpse into the core capabilities of the Memoh ecosystem.

desc.d1:
Chat anywhere. They remember who you are across device.
From private DMs to busy group threads, they stay in sync and never lose the plot.
desc.d2:
Every agent gets its own 'private room' with zero access to your host files.
If a script crashes or hits an error, it stays locked in the box—no harm done.
desc.d3:
Plug in your favorite LLMs and vector stores, or connect to a private cluster.
Mix and match compute engines like Lego to build the brain your needs.
desc.d4:
Skip the terminal. Manage private files inside containers with a simple web view.
Control exactly who sees what, keeping all agent-generated data safe and tidy.
desc.d5:
Set up cron tasks and heartbeats to keep your agents busy even while you sleep.
Whether it's daily web scraping or syncing docs, they handle the heavy lifting.
desc.d6:
Stop guessing where your budget goes. Track every token and cent in real-time.
Granular charts reveal which models are worth the cost and where to save power.

a1.title: Containerized Isolation
a1.desc: Every bot runs in its own 'virtual computer' via containerd. Isolated filesystems and networks ensure the host is safe even if a tool fails.

a2.title: Advanced Memory
a2.desc: Pluggable hybrid retrieval (Dense + Sparse + BM25) paired with LLM-driven fact extraction. Bots maintain autonomous long-term recall.

a3.title: Omnichannel Native
a3.desc: First-class support for Telegram, Discord, Lark, WeChat, Matrix, and Email. Deploy your agent logic once and interact anywhere.
